---
title: "SummarizerElement"
description: "Summarizes history spans and emits structured summary artifacts"
---

`SummarizerElement` condenses a span of history payloads into a `StructuredPayload`
with `data["type"] == "summary"`. It sits behind
`HistoryHandlerElement.summary_candidate_output`, which emits a structured summary
request when older entries are eligible for summarization.

The element uses an internal chat model backend (`openrouter` by default, or
`litellm`) in atomic mode. `summary_output` only emits after the LLM response text
has been resolved.

## Instantiation

```python
from pyllments.elements import SummarizerElement

summarizer_el = SummarizerElement(
    model_name="openai/gpt-4o-mini",
    summary_instructions="Summarize the conversation for future context.",
)
```

**Arguments:**

`backend`: Literal['openrouter', 'litellm'] = 'openrouter'<br>
<span class="tab">Selects the LLM backend used for summarization.</span>
`model_name`: str = 'openai/gpt-4o-mini'<br>
<span class="tab">The backend model name. Passed through to the internal chat model.</span>
`model_args`: dict = {}<br>
<span class="tab">Additional provider request arguments such as temperature.</span>
`base_url`: str = None<br>
<span class="tab">LiteLLM-only. Base URL for a custom or local model endpoint.</span>
`api_key`: str = None<br>
<span class="tab">Optional API key passed to the backend model. OpenRouter also reads `OPENROUTER_API_KEY` from the environment.</span>
`summary_instructions`: str<br>
<span class="tab">System instructions describing what the summary should preserve and omit.</span>
`summary_format_prompt`: str<br>
<span class="tab">Final user prompt sent after the source payloads to request the summary output.</span>
`strategy`: str = 'default'<br>
<span class="tab">Optional label stored on the emitted summary structured payload.</span>

### Input Ports

| Port Name | Payload Type | Behavior |
|-----------|--------------|----------|
| `summary_request_emit_input` | `StructuredPayload` (`type: summary_request`) | Converts source payloads into messages, asks the LLM for a summary, and emits a structured summary artifact with the same `source_entry_ids`. |
| `payloads_emit_input` | `MessagePayload`, `ToolsResponsePayload`, or lists of those payloads | Ad hoc summarization path. Emits a structured summary without history entry IDs. |

:: {.hover}

### Output Ports

| Port Name | Payload Type | Behavior |
|-----------|--------------|----------|
| `summary_output` | `StructuredPayload` (`type: summary`) | Emits the resolved summary text and metadata. Usually connected to `HistoryHandlerElement.summary_input`. |

:: {.hover}

## History Wiring

```python
history_handler_el.ports.summary_candidate_output > summarizer_el.ports.summary_request_emit_input
summarizer_el.ports.summary_output > history_handler_el.ports.summary_input
```

See [Structured Summary Contract](../../explanation/StructuredSummary.qmd) for the
`data` field shapes.

## Message Assembly

1. A system message from `summary_instructions`.
2. Source payloads converted to `MessagePayload` using the same conversion map as `ContextBuilderElement`.
3. A final user message from `summary_format_prompt`.

## Summary Artifact Fields

| Field | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| `content` | The resolved summary text. |
| `source_entry_ids` | History ledger entry IDs covered by this summary. |
| `strategy` | Optional summarization strategy label. |
| `model_name` | Backend model that produced the summary. |
| `timestamp` | Creation time for the artifact. |

## Ad Hoc Summarization

```python
some_element.ports.payloads_output > summarizer_el.ports.payloads_emit_input
summarizer_el.ports.summary_output > downstream_el.ports.summary_input
```

Because this path does not carry ledger IDs, a history handler that receives the
summary will append it but cannot mark prior entries as summarized.
